case_title: TEICHERT, JACQUELINE K. VS HUNT, MANDA (C/O THOMAS WEISEL PARTNERS) et al

docket_entries.description: FOR FURTHER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSION ON PLFT TO ADD LANDLORD AS DEFT. AND SERVE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-03-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-28-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,837.50 FILED BY TEICHERT, JACQUELINE K. AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, MANDA (C/O THOMAS WEISEL PARTNERS) MARSEILLE, DIEUWKE REGAN, ALLISON LEE, YAOQUINN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, MANDA (C/O THOMAS WEISEL PARTNERS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEICHERT, JACQUELINE K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUNT, MANDA (C/O THOMAS WEISEL PARTNERS) MARSEILLE, DIEUWKE REGAN, ALLISON LEE, YAOQUINN ALLISON REGAN AND YAOQUIN LEE ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
